profile_target.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --noplot

baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_while/batched_scalar_add_128 --noplot

after.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_while/batched_scalar_add_128 --noplot

lever: Guarded dense-I64 batch-axis-0 while add/lt path borrows i64 slices and runs the scalar recurrence directly, avoiding dense buffer materialization into Vec<Literal>, active-mask allocation, and per-iteration Literal op/condition matchers.

isomorphism.accepted_surface: inputs len 3; body_op absent or add; cond_op absent or lt; at least one input batched on axis 0; all batched inputs are dense I64 rank-1 tensors with equal batch size; unbatched inputs are I64 scalar or scalar tensor.
isomorphism.fallback_surface: non-I64, non-dense I64 tensors, nonzero batch axes, mismatched batch sizes, non-add body ops, non-lt cond ops, non-scalar/rank-mismatched inputs, malformed tensors, and all functional sub-jaxpr while cases use the existing generic path.
isomorphism.ordering: Each lane is independent under vmapped while semantics; evaluating one lane to completion yields the same per-lane carry as the prior lockstep active-mask loop because no lane can observe another lane. Output lane order is batch index order.
isomorphism.integer_semantics: The body uses i64::wrapping_add exactly like apply_while_scalar_op(WhileScalarOp::Add) for Literal::I64.
isomorphism.condition_semantics: The cond uses carry < threshold exactly like apply_while_scalar_cond(WhileCondOp::Lt) for Literal::I64.
isomorphism.max_iter_semantics: If a lane executes max_iter body updates, the path returns the same while_loop exceeded max iterations error even if the final body update makes the condition false, matching the prior active flag after the last condition check.
isomorphism.floating_point: FP inputs are excluded, so FP ordering, NaN, signed zero, and rounding behavior remain on the existing path.
isomorphism.rng: No RNG state or tie-breaking surface is involved.

validation_completed: rch focused dense_i64_add_lt tests on ts2: 2 passed
